links.context: vengeance becomes worse than the one on whom he takes vengeance (JohnChr). "'Vengeance is Mine, I will repay,' says the Lord" ([[ROM.12:19]]; see also Lv 19:18; [[DEU.32:35]]). The vengeance taken on Joab by Solomon was at the Lord's direction, but we should avoid
This concept is recorded in [[DEU.32:35]], and is affirmed by St. Paul in [[ROM.12:19]].
